title: Exp Level Up Health
body:
This mod enables players to increase their health cap by 1 heart for every 5 levels they ascend, with a maximum increase of up to 100 additional health points.

Uses the vanilla experience bar.

Compatible with multiplayer games.

Note: The maximum health will increase as the level rises, but it will also decrease if the level drops.

这个模组使玩家每提升5级就可以增加1颗心的血量上限，最多能增加至100点血量。

使用原版经验条。

兼容多人游戏。

注意：最大生命值会随着等级上升而增加，但等级下降最大生命值也会减少。
